title: Session 31: Related Rates
content:
« Previous | Next »
Overview The derivative tells us how a change in one variable affects another variable. Related rates problems ask how two different derivatives are related. For example, if we know how fast water is being pumped into a tank we can calculate how fast the water level in the tank is rising. The chain rule is the key to solving such problems.
